title: Build SamayYaan KathaLok cultural festival webpage

requirements.text: Create a full-width hero section with a culturally evocative background image, headline 'SamayYaan presents KathaLok', subheadline 'Where Bharat's Culture Comes Alive', tagline 'SamayYaan's Annual Cultural Festival Celebrating India's Timeless Heritage', scroll CTA button labeled 'Discover KathaLok ↓', and a semi-transparent warm gradient overlay for text legibility
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section spans full viewport width
Background image shows classical performance, heritage architecture, or festive atmosphere
All text elements (headline, subheadline, tagline) are visible and legible
Scroll CTA button is centered and functional
Warm gradient overlay is applied

requirements.text: Create a bold, centered ticket booking CTA strip with headline 'Be Part of the Living Heritage', button labeled 'Book Your Tickets Now', and sub-text with date, venue, and city placeholders

quotes: Headline: *"Be Part of the Living Heritage"*

acceptanceCriteria: CTA strip is full-width and visually prominent
Headline, button, and sub-text are centered
Placeholder text for date, venue, and city is present
Button has clear hover/active states

requirements.text: Create a Festival Highlights section with intro copy 'KathaLok bridges Ancient Bharat with contemporary expression — through voice, rhythm, story, and stage.' Display 8 event types as icon + title + 2-line description cards: (1) Talks & Dialogues - Speeches and discussions by respected cultural personalities, (2) College Band Performances - Live musical sets by student bands, (3) Solo Artist Performances - Individual artists across classical and folk genres, (4) Book Launches - New titles celebrating Indian literature, history, and culture, (5) Taal-Yudh - The battle of Indian percussionists, (6) Sur-SamayYaan: Sa Se Sargam Tak - A musical journey tracing the evolution of Indian instruments across eras, (7) Storytelling Performances - Oral traditions brought to life on stage, (8) NSD Theatrical Play - A dramatic production by the National School of Drama

quotes: Display the following as icon + title + 2-line description cards

acceptanceCriteria: Section includes intro copy at the top
All 8 event types are displayed as cards
Each card shows an icon, title, and 2-line description
Cards are arranged in a grid or horizontal scroll layout
Layout is responsive on mobile devices

requirements.text: Create an Experience Zones section with intro 'Step into India — one experience at a time.' Display 6 zones as interactive tiles or image cards: Ayurveda Workshops, Attar & Fragrance Experience, Traditional Games of Bharat, Brahmi Script Writing Demonstrations, Books & Literature Corner, Regional Food Stalls — A Culinary Map of India

quotes: Display as interactive tiles or image cards

acceptanceCriteria: Section includes intro text
All 6 experience zones are displayed
Each zone is presented as an interactive tile or image card
Tiles have hover effects or visual feedback
Layout adapts to mobile screens

requirements.text: Create a Schedule/Program Highlights section with day-wise or time-slot based program overview using placeholder content with clear labels. Use a clean timeline or table layout with optional category filtering (Talks / Music / Theatre / Zones)

quotes: Filter by category optional (Talks / Music / Theatre / Zones)

acceptanceCriteria: Schedule is organized by day or time slot
Uses placeholder content with clear labels
Timeline or table layout is clean and readable
Optional category filters are functional
Schedule is scrollable and responsive

requirements.text: Create a Participate/Newsletter section with two side-by-side forms: (1) Participation Form with fields for name, email, area of interest (performer/volunteer/attendee), and message, (2) Newsletter Signup with email field and subscribe button. Include subtext 'Stay connected with India's cultural pulse'

quotes: Subtext: *"Stay connected with India's cultural pulse"*

acceptanceCriteria: Two forms are displayed side-by-side on desktop
Participation form includes all specified fields
Newsletter form has email field and subscribe button
Subtext is displayed below forms
Forms stack vertically on mobile devices
Forms have validation and submission handling

requirements.text: Create a Closing/Acknowledgements section with a warm closing statement about KathaLok's mission, logos and acknowledgement text for Ministry of Culture (Government of India), IGNCA (Indira Gandhi National Centre for the Arts), ASI (Archaeological Survey of India), and NSD (National School of Drama). Include footer with SamayYaan branding, social links, and contact information

quotes: Footer with SamayYaan branding, social links, and contact

acceptanceCriteria: Section includes warm closing statement
All 4 organization logos are displayed with acknowledgement text
Footer contains SamayYaan branding
Social media links are present and functional
Contact information is included

requirements.text: Apply elegant, heritage-inspired design system throughout the webpage using warm earth tone color palette (saffron, deep maroon, ivory, gold accents, forest green), elegant serif font for headings (Playfair Display or similar), clean sans-serif for body text (Lato or Inter), and subtle classical Indian motifs (rangoli, mandala, block print textures) as watermark-style patterns in section backgrounds

quotes: Color palette: Saffron, deep maroon, ivory, gold accents, forest green

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses specified warm earth tones consistently
Headings use elegant serif typography
Body text uses clean sans-serif typography
Classical Indian motifs appear as subtle background patterns
Design feels cohesive and heritage-inspired throughout

requirements.text: Ensure all sections are full-width, scroll-friendly, and fully mobile-responsive with appropriate breakpoints for tablet and mobile devices

quotes: All sections should be full-width, scroll-friendly, and mobile-responsive

acceptanceCriteria: All sections span full viewport width
Smooth scrolling behavior is implemented
Layout adapts appropriately on tablet screens
Layout adapts appropriately on mobile screens
Content remains readable and accessible at all breakpoints

constraints: Use React with TypeScript as the frontend framework
All sections must be full-width and responsive
Design must follow specified color palette: saffron, deep maroon, ivory, gold accents, forest green
nonGoals: Database storage for participant or newsletter data
Live schedule updates or admin panel

required: Culturally evocative hero background showing classical performance, heritage architecture, or festive atmosphere with warm lighting (hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png)
Icon illustration for Talks & Dialogues event - speech bubbles or microphone in heritage style (icon-talks.dim_128x128.png)
Icon illustration for College Band Performances - guitar or musical notes in modern style (icon-band.dim_128x128.png)
Icon illustration for Solo Artist Performances - classical musician silhouette (icon-solo.dim_128x128.png)
Icon illustration for Book Launches - open book with decorative border (icon-books.dim_128x128.png)
Icon illustration for Taal-Yudh - tabla or percussion instruments (icon-taal.dim_128x128.png)
Icon illustration for Sur-SamayYaan - collection of traditional Indian instruments (icon-sur.dim_128x128.png)
Icon illustration for Storytelling Performances - scroll or traditional storyteller silhouette (icon-story.dim_128x128.png)
Icon illustration for NSD Theatrical Play - theater masks in classical style (icon-theatre.dim_128x128.png)
Image card for Ayurveda Workshops showing herbs and traditional wellness elements (ayurveda.dim_600x400.png)
Image card for Attar & Fragrance Experience showing traditional perfume bottles and flowers (attar.dim_600x400.png)
Image card for Traditional Games of Bharat showing board games or outdoor activities (games.dim_600x400.png)
Image card for Brahmi Script Writing Demonstrations showing ancient script and writing tools (brahmi.dim_600x400.png)
Image card for Books & Literature Corner showing collection of Indian literature (literature.dim_600x400.png)
Image card for Regional Food Stalls showing variety of traditional Indian cuisine (food.dim_600x400.png)
Logo for Ministry of Culture, Government of India with official emblem (logo-moc.dim_200x200.png)
Logo for IGNCA (Indira Gandhi National Centre for the Arts) (logo-ignca.dim_200x200.png)
Logo for ASI (Archaeological Survey of India) with official emblem (logo-asi.dim_200x200.png)
Logo for NSD (National School of Drama) with official branding (logo-nsd.dim_200x200.png)
Rangoli pattern texture for section background in warm earth tones (pattern-rangoli.dim_800x800.png)
Mandala pattern texture for section background in subtle gold and ivory (pattern-mandala.dim_800x800.png)
Block print texture pattern in maroon and saffron tones (pattern-blockprint.dim_800x800.png)
